metadata.title: Awards, Honours & Persons in News Current Affairs MCQs

questions.question: Who is the author of the book titled “The Sage who Reimagined Hinduism: The Life, Lessons and Legacy of Sree Narayana Guru”?
questions.explanation: Vice President C. P. Radhakrishnan released the book The Sage who Reimagined Hinduism The Life Lessons and Legacy of Sree Narayana Guru in New Delhi. The book is authored by Shashi Tharoor. It highlights life and teachings of Sree Narayana Guru who worked against caste discrimination and social injustice.

questions.question: Who is the author of the book Atal Bihari Vajpayee: The Eternal Statesman released by Vice-President C. P. Radhakrishnan in February 2026?
questions.explanation: C. P. Radhakrishnan released the book Atal Bihari Vajpayee: The Eternal Statesman. The book is authored by Vijay Goel. It was launched at Dr Ambedkar International Centre on February 21. The Vice-President called it a tribute to Atal Bihari Vajpayee, Bharat Ratna awardee. Vajpayee was praised for integrity, inclusive politics and democratic values.

questions.question: The “Dhwani Spandana” initiative, which received the Governance Now 12th PSU National Award for innovation, is associated with which state?
questions.explanation: Karnataka State Road Transport Corporation received the Governance Now 12th PSU National Award in the “Excellence in Innovation” category. The award was given for the “Dhwani Spandana” initiative designed to assist visually impaired passengers. The system has been implemented in 200 Mysuru City Transport buses in Mysuru. It was developed with technical support from GIZ Germany. The initiative has improved safety, confidence, and mobility freedom for visually impaired passengers using public transport. The award was presented at the Governance Now Awards ceremony held in New Delhi.

questions.question: The Jnanpith Award is given for excellence in which field?
questions.explanation: 60th Jnanpith Award (2025) will be conferred on R. Vairamuthu. Jnanpith Award is the highest literary award in India. The award is presented by Bharatiya Jnanpith. R. Vairamuthu is a distinguished Tamil poet, lyricist and writer. He is recognised for creative depth, powerful poetic voice and contribution to Tamil literature. His writings focus on human emotions, social issues and nature. The selection committee meeting was chaired by Pratibha Ray.

questions.question: Who has won the Mark Lynton History Prize 2026 for his book The Golden Road: How Ancient India Transformed the World?
questions.explanation: Historian and author William Dalrymple has won the Mark Lynton History Prize 2026 for his book The Golden Road: How Ancient India Transformed the World. The prize recognizes works of history that combine scholarly rigor with literary elegance and carries a $10,000 cash award. It is part of the J. Anthony Lukas Book Prize, administered by the Nieman Foundation for Journalism and Columbia University School of Journalism.

questions.question: The Legion of Honour (Légion d’honneur) is an award of which country?
questions.explanation: Jawed Ashraf, former Ambassador of India to France, received the Legion of Honour (Commandeur rank) on 18 March 2026, becoming the first Indian Ambassador to get this honour for strengthening India–France ties. The award was presented in New Delhi by Thierry Mathou, in the presence of Ajit Doval (National Security Advisor – NSA). Other Indian recipients of this rank include J. R. D. Tata, Ratan Tata, Amartya Sen, Ravi Shankar, Satyajit Ray, S. H. Raza and Manna Dey.

questions.question: The Saraswati Samman 2025 has been awarded for the Bengali novel Hara Parbati Katha. Who is its author?
questions.explanation: The Bengali novel “Hara Parbati Katha” by Ramkumar Mukhopadhyay has been selected for the Saraswati Samman 2025. Saraswati Samman was instituted in 1991 by the K.K. Birla Foundation. It is awarded annually for outstanding literary work written in any Indian language by an Indian citizen. Eligible works must be published within the last 10 years. The award carries a cash prize of ₹15 lakh, along with a citation and a plaque. It is one of India’s most prestigious literary awards recognizing excellence in literature.

questions.question: Who was honoured with the Women Empowerment Award for Art and Culture at the House of Commons in the United Kingdom?
questions.explanation: Rituparna Sengupta was honoured with the Women Empowerment Award for Art and Culture at the House of Commons in the United Kingdom. The award was presented by Seema Malhotra and Virendra Sharma during an event organised by GloWomen CiC. The ceremony was held to mark International Women’s Day, celebrating women’s contributions across various fields. Rituparna Sengupta was specifically recognised for her significant contributions to art and culture.

questions.question: Who has been selected to represent India at the World Youth Parliament 2026?
questions.explanation: Stuti Pradhan has been selected to represent India at the World Youth Parliament 2026 after winning the Viksit Bharat Youth Parliament 2025. The World Youth Parliament is an international platform where young leaders from multiple countries come together to discuss global challenges and suggest policy solutions. Her selection reflects India’s emphasis on promoting youth leadership and participation in global affairs. She will contribute to discussions on key issues such as climate change, education, and sustainable development.

questions.question: Who was honoured with the Lifetime Achievement Award at the International Film Festival of Delhi 2026?
questions.explanation: Nandamuri Balakrishna was honoured with the Lifetime Achievement Award at the International Film Festival of Delhi 2026 on March 26, 2026, held at Bharat Mandapam. The award recognises his five-decade-long contribution to Indian cinema, especially his impact on Telugu film industry. Known for his versatility, he has delivered performances in both commercial and character-driven roles, becoming an iconic figure. A key highlight of the event was the screening of his film Bhagavanth Kesari, directed by Anil Ravipudi.
